About Us

Hassan Khan

Managing Director

Hassaan Khan is closely involved in the company’s day-to-day direction. With a good sense of what farmers need, he helps maintain a practical approach and ensures our work stays organized and effective.

Contact

0300-6864005

Dr. Asif Waseem

Managing Director

Dr. Asif Waseem contributes a strong understanding of poultry treatments and disease prevention. He focuses on choosing reliable medicines and supports the team with straightforward, informed insight.

Contact

0321-7736809

Dr. Ashar Raza Khan

B.D.M National

Dr. Ashar Raza Khan has solid experience in poultry health and medicine. He contributes practical guidance to the company and helps ensure the products align with real needs in the field. His role in the company is shaped by a genuine interest in improving poultry health and supporting everyday farm needs.
